title: Sum Even Numbers
summary: Write a Python function that returns the sum of all even numbers in a list.
instructions: Implement the function `sum_even_numbers(nums)`.||Return the sum of all even integers in the input list.||If there are no even numbers, return `0`.

title: Top Customers by Order Count
summary: Write a SQL query that returns each customer and how many orders they placed.
instructions: Use the `customers` and `orders` tables provided in the test database.||Return two columns: `customer_name` and `order_count`.||Sort by `order_count` descending, then `customer_name` ascending.
starter_code:
SELECT
  c.name AS customer_name,
  COUNT(o.id) AS order_count
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY order_count DESC, customer_name ASC;
